EmailTemplate.description: Email sent to User to notify him that a log has been assigned to him
EmailTemplate.name: Easy Log : Email sent to Admin Log Assigned
EmailTemplate.subject: Easy Log : {!Bug_Log__c.Name} has been assigned to you
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello {!Bug_Log__c.AssignedTo__c} !
Please noticed that {!Bug_Log__c.Name} has been assigned to you !
Go on Easy Log page to check {!Bug_Log__c.Owner__c} 's request and provide a quick solution !
Follow the link :https://carmignac-crm.lightning.force.com/one/one.app?source=alohaHeader#/sObject/{!Bug_Log__c.Id}/view
For information, {!Bug_Log__c.Name} concerns {!Bug_Log__c.App__c}
According to {!Bug_Log__c.Owner__c}, it is {!Bug_Log__c.PrioritySeverity__c} and wish to be resolved {!Bug_Log__c.Expected_Date__c}.
Good Luck {!Bug_Log__c.AssignedTo__c} !
